prestazioni: Forged internals upgrade for the LF-VE (2.0L MZR DISI Turbo) engine: Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons to handle 350+ WHP reliably with a 28 psi boost ceiling on E85 fuel.

Custom turbo system: Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a divorced wastegate setup (Tial MV-R 44mm external gate) and a Vibrant 1799 ultra-quiet resonator to eliminate drone while maintaining flow.

Full fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup with -8AN lines to prevent oil buildup in the intake tract under high boost.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (NB2-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hardtop featuring a custom matte gunmetal finish and integrated duckbill spoiler for reduced lift.

Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers with custom valving for the Mazdaspeed MX-5’s 51/49 weight distribution, paired with Cusco 2-way adjustable front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 19mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension.

Custom front bumper lip from Garage Vary (Japan-exclusive) with integrated LED fog lights and a carbon fiber diffuser from APR Performance, finished with a custom vinyl wrap in Mazda’s original Velocity Red Mica with a satin clear coat for a stealth OEM+ look.
